title: Spain seizes record amount of cocaine in Atlantic Ocean, authorities say
summary_full: The Civil Guard found between 30,000 and 45,000kg of the drug on a freighter headed to Libya.
summary_public: The Civil Guard found between 30,000 and 45,000kg of the drug on a freighter headed to Libya.
